name: Cresol
description: Cresol is a hydroxytoluene that is extracted from coal tar or made synthetically. Pure cresol is a mixture of ortho-, meta-, and para- isomers. Cresols are precursors or synthetic intermediates to other compounds and materials, including plastics, pesticides, pharmaceuticals, disinfectants, and dyes. Ingestion of cresol induces toxicity in humans and can lead to burning of the mouth and throat, abdominal pain and vomiting. However at concentrations normally found in the environment, cresols do not pose any significant risk for the general population.
